---
title: "Linus Chirchir" 
subtitle: |
  <h5 style="text-align: center;">Research Data | Data Science | Trusted Research Environments</h5>
image: images/profile.jpg
image-alt: "Profile Image"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      aria-label: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/LinusChirchir/
      target: _blank
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      aria-label: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0DCF9mwAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - icon: person-badge
      text: ORCID
      aria-label: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2687-5967
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      aria-label: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/LinusChirchir
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact
      aria-label: Contact
      href: mailto:linus@linuschirchir.com
      target: _blank
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute: 
  freeze: true
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I am a Data Analyst at [Research Data Scotland](https://www.researchdata.scot/about-rds/our-people/){target="_blank"} with a strong interest in data-driven research, Trusted Research Environments (TREs), data governance, and the responsible use of data for public benefit. Read my five-minute profile interview with Research Data Scotland [here](https://www.researchdata.scot/news-and-insights/five-minute-profile-interview-with-linus-chirchir/){target="_blank"}.

My work focuses on improving access to, understanding of, and value from complex administrative and health-related datasets. I contribute to the development of data pipelines, metadata standards, synthetic data solutions, research data services, and analytical tools that support researchers, policymakers, and public sector organisations.

I have expertise in data management, statistical analysis, data visualisation, reproducible research, and research data infrastructure. My technical toolkit includes R, SQL, PostgreSQL, Git, GitHub, Tableau, Power BI, QGIS, SPSS, and advanced Excel, alongside modern reproducible reporting and publishing tools such as Quarto.

My interests span data science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, synthetic data, metadata, and data stewardship. I am particularly passionate about strengthening the research data ecosystem by improving data quality, transparency, accessibility, and trust.

Through my work and research, I aim to help unlock the potential of data to support evidence-informed decision-making, advance scientific discovery, and deliver meaningful societal impact.
:::
